title: The Journey Begins
highlight: Rahul: Aaj call pr Gate score check kr rhe the tabhi phone cut ho jata hai and Yadav suddenly gone like a ghost, mujhe kuch idea nahi tha kya chal raha hai. Yadav: Achanak plan bana France jaane ka aur packing me busy thi.
memory: The first day Yadav left for France. A mix of excitement and sadness because we couldn't meet at the airport.
quote: Distance is just a test of how far friendship can travel.

title: Full Day of Travel
highlight: Rahul: Subah uthte hi tera airport wala photo dekha. Thoda gussa bhi aaya kyunki mil nahi paya, but phir samjha ki sab kuch achanak hua hoga. Yadav: Kuwait wali flight me baithne ke baad bataya sab kuch aur France pahunch kar voice note bheja ki safely pahunch gayi.
memory: Yadav sent the first voice note from France. It felt like her dream was finally becoming real. Later we talked on a video call from the train and shared many stories.
quote: A new city, a new adventure, but the same bond.

title: First Morning in France
highlight: Yadav: Poora din documents aur university work me busy thi aur naye friends bhi mile. Rahul: Reply nahi aaya par pata tha wo safe hai.
memory: Yadav's first day at the university in France.
quote: Learning becomes more exciting when life itself is the classroom.

title: Morning View from Window
highlight: Rahul: Raat me call aaya aur tab pata chala France ka time India se 4:30 hours piche hai. Usne apna first day share kiya aur maine apne flatmates ke saath Holi ki baat batayi.
memory: From this day I decided to pray for her every morning until she comes back to India.
quote: True friendship means caring for someone even from miles away.

title: Feeling Low
highlight: Yadav: Aaj thoda down feel ho raha hai. Rahul: Fir kaafi der video call par baat ki aur sab share kiya.
memory: She felt a little homesick, but after a long conversation we ended up laughing for hours.
quote: Sometimes a long conversation is all it takes to make a day better.

title: Comeback Day of Yadav's Mood
highlight: Yadav: Aaj kaafi acha lag raha hai aur achha khana bhi khaya. Rahul: Main Holi ke liye ghar nikal raha hoon.
memory: A funny moment when my phone was left in the kitchen and bhabhi saw the call while we were talking.
quote: Happiness often comes from a simple conversation.

title: Ice Hockey Day
highlight: Yadav: Aaj ice hockey dekhne gayi aur bahut enjoy kiya. Rahul: Main ghar safely pahunch gaya.
memory: We talked only briefly today but even small conversations mattered.
quote: Distance makes you appreciate even the smallest moments.

title: First Sunday in March
highlight: Yadav: Ab thoda settle ho gayi hoon. Rahul: Main jagran me busy tha.
memory: Yadav visited an Indian restaurant and finally had a proper meal and good sleep.
quote: Even far from home, good food and rest can bring comfort.

title: Fresh Mood Begins
highlight: Rahul: Maine jiju ke saath Holi celebrate ki. Yadav: Busy in studies but enjoying the new environment.
memory: A busy day for both of us but still managed to chat a little.
quote: Festivals feel different when a friend celebrating with you is miles away.

title: First Test
highlight: Yadav: Aaj test hua. Rahul: Main bahar baith kar baat kar raha tha.
memory: Internet slow tha but we still managed to talk and share stories.
quote: Even slow internet cannot slow down real conversations.

title: Holi Missing
highlight: Yadav: Class me busy. Rahul: Apne gaon gaya tha.
memory: Different time zones made it difficult to talk, but it felt good seeing her settling well there.
quote: Different time zones, but the same friendship.

title: Festival Night
highlight: Rahul: Bazaar ghoom raha tha. Yadav: College festival night enjoy kar rahi thi.
memory: They cooked bread sandwiches together with friends.
quote: New places bring new stories and unforgettable memories.

title: Presentation Day
highlight: Yadav: Aaj IoT presentation thi. Rahul: Mujhe yaad nahi aaj kya baat hui thi.
memory: Her first presentation in France.
quote: The first step in a new place is always the bravest one.

title: Learning Something New
highlight: Yadav: Piano seekhne wali hoon. Rahul: College life me wapas aa gaya.
memory: She started learning piano and guitar while adjusting to life there.
quote: Every new skill is a step forward in a new life.

title: Early Morning Call
highlight: Rahul: Subah subah call kar diya jab wo so rahi thi.
memory: We talked about random things and wished her Happy Women's Day.
quote: Sometimes the best memories begin with an unexpected call.

title: Busy Day
highlight: Yadav: College me busy. Rahul: MSE exams start ho gaye.
memory: We couldn't talk much but small messages kept the connection alive.
quote: Busy days remind us how valuable even a small message can be.

title: Germany Tour
highlight: Yadav: Germany trip par gayi thi.
memory: It felt amazing seeing her explore another country and enjoy the journey.
quote: The world becomes smaller when your friends start exploring it.

title: Hackathon Day
highlight: Yadav: Hackathon me busy thi aur language samajh nahi aa rahi thi.
memory: Even without understanding everything she kept trying.
quote: Sometimes we don't understand everything, but we still keep going.

title: Hackathon Day 2
highlight: Yadav: Aaj thoda samajh aaya aur naye friends bhi bane.
memory: She made new international friends and started enjoying the experience.
quote: New friendships make a foreign place feel a little more like home.

title: Planning a Surprise
highlight: Rahul: Website bana raha hoon uske liye. Yadav: Hackathon me second place.
memory: Started building this digital diary to save every memory of the journey.
quote: Some stories are too special to stay only in memory.

title: online msti on songs
highlight: Rahul: Website update kar raha tha aur usse kuch memories confirm kar raha tha.
memory: We talked for hours while she was working and I was building the website.
quote: Every day apart is another page added to our story.

title: Yadav in kitchen 🔪
memory: Yadav: Aaj mene or abhia ne ghr pr khana banane ka socha h and wo saman layegi and hum aaj yahi banake khayenge biryani banane ka pln h . Rahul:Aaj Shinchan aur meri ladayi huyi h and mene aaj jayda hi bol diya tha .
highlight: busy in kitchen fullbusy day 😒.
quote: QUOTE ye h mujhe kab khana khila rhi h apne hath ka :) .

title: Busy Day & Sweet chocolate teddy 🍫
memory: Yadav: Aaj Yadav poora din busy thi, lekin usne ek cute boy-shaped chocolate li. Choti choti cheezein share krti h jab wo uske saath special lagti hain.
highlight: Busy day bhi sweet ban gaya.
quote: Choti choti baatein hi life ko beautiful banati hain.

title: First Piano Note 🎶
memory: Yadav: Aaj Yadav ne pehli baar piano ka ek note bajaya aur wo bahut khush thi. Usne apne dream boy ke baare mein bhi baat ki aur kaha ki zindagi hume wahi le jaati hai jaha milna likha hota hai paris jaa rhi h waha dhundhegi 😶‍🌫️ . Rahul : mene jo piano ki kal video maangi thi aaj usne bheji thi bna k and m bahut khus hua usee sun k .
highlight: Sapne aur music dono saath mein.
quote: Zindagi tumhe wahi le jaati hai jaha tumhara milna likha hota hai.

title: Random Talks & Tooth Pain 😅
memory: Yadav: Aaj har bande par crush wali baatein hui 😄 aur France ke boys ke baare mein bhi khub saari batien huyi. Saath hi uske teeth mein thoda pain bhi tha kyuniki ek nayi jaad aa rhi h ussee ab and ek duplicate teeth tha wo gyab ho gya 😬.
highlight: Fun talks + little pain day.
quote: Kabhi hasi, kabhi thoda dard — life ka combo pack.

title: Concert & First Fast 🎤🙏
memory: Yadav: Aaj Yadav concert mein gayi aur uske dost alxaa ne usse future concerts ke liye bhi pucha. Aaj usne Navratri ka pehla fast bhi rakha aur wo bahut happy thi aaj usne class m beth k baat ki wo aaj ekli ruki thi sirf uske concert k liye and wo kaafi khush thi .
highlight: Music + faith = pure happiness.
quote: Jab mann khush ho aur dil shaant, wahi perfect din hota hai.

title: Late Night Walk & Emotions 🌙
memory: Yadav: Aaj Yadav pehli baar raat mein der tak ghoomi Strasbourg mein, wo bhi pedal Wo bahut happy thi Maine uska wait kiya aur thoda bura laga par jab usne call karke sab share kiya, mera gussa khatam ho gaya Uski khushi mein hi meri khushi hai usne aaj teddy liya h ek doggy khub saari baatein batayi usne aaj usne apni dream car bhi dekhi h .
highlight: Wait, emotions, aur finally smile.
quote: Uski khushi hi meri asli khushi hai.

title: Teddy & Dream Lambo 🧸🏎️
memory: Yadav: Aaj Saturday ko wo late uthi Kal raat usne ek teddy liya aur uske saath ghoomi, sab usse dekh ke hans rahe the. Aaj Alex ka message aaya Lamborghini ke baare mein ki usne just abhi lembo dekhi h green yadav ka dream hai ki wo ek din Lamborghini le. Rahul: aaj mene bola ki mujhe betha legi kya lembo m tab usne ek baat boli ki tere naam hi nikal duu wo baat man ko lag gyi and m haappy hu bahut ki ujhe meri sabse achi dost esii baatein jab bolti h 😍.
highlight: Cute teddy + big dreams.
quote: Chote moments aur bade sapne hi life ko special banate hain.

title: Drawing, Night Out & Health
highlight: Yadav: Aaj drawing ki hai aur bahar ghumne bhi gayi thi, mera second night out bhi tha. Rahul: Meri tabiyat thodi kharab thi aaj.
memory: Aaj Yadav ne drawing ki aur apni second night out enjoy ki. Main thoda sick tha, but uski updates sunke achha laga ki wo enjoy kar rahi hai.
quote: Even on hard days, someone’s happiness can bring comfort.

title: Indian Food Night
highlight: Rahul: Aaj maine Alexa se baat ki. Yadav: Main kaafi late aayi aur aaj naan, cream paneer aur lollipop mila, bill Alex ne pay kiya.
memory: Aaj Yadav late wapas aayi but usne Indian food enjoy kiya. Usne poori outing share ki aur uski baaton se laga ki din kaafi interesting raha.
quote: Good food and good company can turn any day into a memory.

title: Work from Home Chill Day
highlight: Yadav: Aaj chhutti li hai aur ghar se pending kaam kar rahi hoon. Rahul: Aaj tum mood me lag rahi thi.
memory: Aaj Yadav ne ghar se kaam kiya, pending cheezein complete ki aur saath me relax bhi kiya. Aaj ka din kaam aur comfort dono ka mix tha.
quote: Some peaceful days are productive in the sweetest way.

title: Piano, Song & Gift Talks
highlight: Yadav: Aaj maine Janam Janam piano par bina kisi help ke seekha. Rahul: Tumne gift ke baare me pucha toh maine bola do parts wala kuch laana, ek tumhare paas aur ek mere paas rahe.
memory: Aaj Yadav ne Janam Janam song piano par khud se seekha, jo uske liye bhi special moment tha. Saath hi humne friendship gift idea bhi discuss kiya.
quote: The best gifts are the ones that keep two hearts connected.

title: Early Sleep & New Responsibility
highlight: Yadav: Aaj jaldi free ho gayi hoon aur jaldi so jaungi, kal raat se sahi se soyi nahi. Rahul: Aaj tumhara test bhi tha aur tumhe next group ka leader bana diya gaya.
memory: Aaj Yadav tired thi because she had not slept well, but the day still felt important because she handled her test and also got chosen as group leader.
quote: Sometimes tired days still carry proud moments.

title: A Strange Quiet Day
highlight: Yadav: Aaj gussa aa raha hai aur pine ka bhi mann kar raha hai. Rahul: Aaj tum thodi sad si lag rahi thi, pata nahi kyun.
memory: Aaj Yadav ka mood off tha. Uski baaton me thoda frustration aur udaasi dono feel ho rahe the, aur mujhe bhi laga ki aaj ka din uske liye halka sa heavy tha.
quote: Some days need understanding more than answers.

title: Cancelled Plans & Food Experiment
highlight: Yadav: Mere plans aksar cancel ho jaate hain aur main ghum nahi paati. Aaj maine khane me experiment kiya — hot chocolate me cake mila diya. Rahul: Ye toh sirf tum hi kar sakti ho.
memory: Aaj usne share kiya ki uske plans baar baar cancel ho jaate hain, but usne apne unique food experiment se din ko funny bana diya.
quote: When plans fail, creativity still finds a way to shine.

title: Germany Walk & Cute Moments 🐱
highlight: Yadav: Aaj Germany me khub ghoomi aur roads par mast walk ki. Rahul: Tumhari photos dekh ke lag raha tha tum sach me enjoy kar rahi ho.
memory: Aaj Yadav ne Germany me kaafi ghooma, waha ki beautiful roads par walk ki aur do cute billiyon ki photos bhi li. Uske din ki simplicity aur happiness dono feel ho rahi thi.
quote: Kabhi kabhi bas ghoomna aur chhoti cheezein dekhna hi sabse badi khushi hoti hai.

title: Workshop & Research Tools
highlight: Yadav: Aaj cyber workshop tha, bahut padhaai ki aur din me khana bhi nahi khaya. Mera food card bhi ban gaya. Rahul: Tumne mujhe Frederick AI tool aur guitar se related ek song bhi bataya.
memory: Aaj ka din kaafi productive tha. Workshop, studies, card setup and AI tool discussion — sab mila ke ek full academic day tha.
quote: Busy days often build the strongest version of us.

title: Snacks, Cake & Happy Shifts
highlight: Yadav: Aaj bahar se moong dal, chips, lays, sugar, chawal, jam aur cake layi hoon. Abiha mere saamne shift ho gayi. Rahul: Tum aaj full happy mood me lag rahi thi.
memory: Aaj Yadav ne apna favorite samaan liya, class miss ho gayi because subah uth nahi paayi, but Abiha ke saamne shift hone se uska mood kaafi achha ho gaya.
quote: Sometimes comfort comes from snacks, laughter, and the right company.

title: A Light Day of Laughs
highlight: Yadav: Aaj ka din halka tha, bas normal masti aur chhoti chhoti updates. Rahul: Aise din bhi yaad reh jaate hain.
memory: Aaj ka din simple tha, but us simplicity me bhi warmth thi. Aise din hi baad me sabse pyaari memories ban jaate hain.
quote: Simple days quietly become unforgettable memories.

title: Club Plans & Exams
highlight: Yadav: Aaj club jaungi aur moj masti karungi, mere 3 exams bhi the. Mujhe firse next group ke liye leader choose kiya gaya. Rahul: Tum har jagah shine kar rahi ho.
memory: Aaj Yadav ke exams bhi the and fun plans bhi. Sabse special baat ye thi ki use firse leader choose kiya gaya.
quote: Responsibility looks beautiful on those who carry it with joy.

title: Late Night Confession
highlight: Yadav: Kal raat maine drinks li thi aur main bahut nashe me thi. Rahul: Tumne aaj sab honestly bataya.
memory: Aaj usne kal raat ki full story share ki. Uski honesty aur masti dono ek saath feel hui aaj.
quote: The most real memories are the ones told without filters.

title: Switzerland in the Rain
highlight: Yadav: Aaj Switzerland gayi thi, par baarish ki wajah se enjoy nahi kar paayi. Rahul: Main kaafi gussa tha, par decide kiya ki jab tum wapas aaogi tab baat karunga.
memory: Aaj ka trip utna achha nahi raha jitni expectation thi because of the rain. Mere andar bhi mixed emotions the, but din yaadgaar phir bhi bana.
quote: Not every trip becomes perfect, but every trip leaves a feeling behind.

title: Sleep-Filled Sunday
highlight: Yadav: Aaj 2:30 baje uthi hoon, aaj meri neend full puri ho gayi. Rahul: Lag raha hai aaj tum sach me relaxed ho.
memory: Aaj Yadav ne achhi sleep li aur pura din relaxed mood me thi. Kabhi kabhi bas rest hi sabse special cheez hoti hai.
quote: A well-rested heart smiles a little brighter.

title: Insta Login & Startup Setup
highlight: Yadav: Aaj maine France se Instagram login kiya. Rahul: Aaj humne apne startup ka setup bhi almost poora kar diya.
memory: Aaj ka din exciting tha because personal life aur startup life dono saath me chal rahi thi. It felt like the start of something bigger.
quote: Big dreams grow stronger when built together.

title: Quiet Day, Growing Work
highlight: Rahul: Aaj properly baat nahi ho paayi. Yadav: Bus me thi aur Sponexus ke followers badha rahi thi.
memory: Aaj conversation chhoti thi, but uski energy startup ke liye lagi hui thi. Chhote updates bhi kaafi meaningful lagte hain.
quote: Even on quiet days, progress still speaks.
